topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Arbitrage: If the futures price of an asset is greater than...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: If the futures price of an asset is greater than the spot price, arbitrage opportunities exist.
solution: This statement is true; if the futures price exceeds the spot price, traders can buy the asset at the lower spot price and sell it at the higher futures price, locking in a profit. This is a fundamental principle of arbitrage in futures markets.
